**Problem**
A clear description of the problem this feature solves.

**Proposed Solution**
How you'd like this to work.

**Alternatives Considered**
Other approaches you've thought about.

**Priority**

- [ ] P0 — blocking / critical
- [ ] P1 — important, next sprint
- [ ] P2 — nice to have
